description_long: This is a large, multi-tiered public monument featuring a patinated bronze statue of a standing human figure atop a substantial stone pedestal. The figure is dressed in long, flowing robes and appears to be holding an object in one hand, with the other arm bent at the elbow. The pedestal is adorned with detailed reliefs, including a reclining figure on the front and a decorative crest or emblem on the back. The base of the monument is constructed from several layers of stone, forming a broad, stepped platform. The overall appearance suggests a commemorative or historical theme, with classical sculptural elements and a weathered greenish patina on the statue. The monument is designed to be a prominent focal point in an urban or park setting.
description: A large bronze statue of a robed figure stands atop a multi-tiered stone pedestal with reliefs and a broad, stepped base. The sculpture features classical details and a green patina, suggesting a commemorative monument.
description_view_0: Front view showing the robed figure, the detailed relief of a reclining person on the pedestal, and the full stepped base.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the profile of the statue and the layered stone base, with minimal relief detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the statue and a decorative crest or emblem on the pedestal, with the full width of the base visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the statue's profile and the plain side of the pedestal, with the stepped base extending outward.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure in classical robes on a commemorative pedestal
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is designed for installation in an outdoor urban plaza or park, as suggested by its monumental scale and stepped stone base.
